name: I-Ketamine
description: Izinzwa ezihlukanisayo ezinikeza i-analgesia, i-sedation, ne-amnesia ngenkathi ilondoloza ingqondo yomoya kanye nokuzinza kwe-hemodynamic. I-analgesic ekhethwayo ku-TCCC -- igcina i-BP ngokungafani nama-opioid. Ibuye isetshenziselwe ukudambisa inqubo kanye ne-RSI.
dose: I-Analgesia: 0.1-0.3 mg/kg IV/IO (i-slow push) | 0.5 mg/kg IM. I-sedation yenqubo: 1-2 mg/kg IV | 4-6 mg/kg IM. Ukungeniswa kwe-RSI: 1-2 mg/kg IV.
contraindications: I-ICP ephakeme ngaphandle kokuvikelwa kwendlela yomoya (isihlobo)
warnings: Ukusabela okuphuthumayo (i-delirium/hallucinations) -- nciphisa nge-midazolam 1-2mg IV uma ikhona.
I-Laryngospasm ayivamile kodwa kungenzeka -- gcina i-BVM itholakala.

pediatric.dose: I-analgesia: 0.5 mg/kg IV. I-sedation yenqubo: 1-2 mg/kg IV | 4-5 mg/kg IM.
pediatric.note: Kufundwe kahle ku-pediatrics. Kuncanyelwa izinqubo ezibuhlungu.

obstetric.note: Iphephile ku-analgesia kamama ngemithamo ephansi. Ingabangela ukudangala kokuphefumula kwengane esanda kuzalwa ngemithamo ephezulu uma ilethwa eduze nesikhathi sokubeletha.

source: JTS CPG: Acute Pain Management / TCCC Guidelines
